scope: Audit optimizer flow and extract only read-only selected-squad optimizer utility helpers.

optimizer_flow.active_candidate_pool: script.js playerAllowedForActiveMatchday, priceMatchesFilters, playerMatchesBuilderCountryFilter, playerMatchesBuilderRiskControls, trustFilteredPlayers, optimizerCandidatePools
optimizer_flow.user_locks: lockedPlayerIds and getValidLockedSquadPlayers keep valid locks first while enforcing position and country limits.
optimizer_flow.exclusions: excludedPlayerIds are checked before candidate pool inclusion.
optimizer_flow.budget_handling: initialBudget, optimizerPriceFloorsByPosition, optimizerCheapestRemainingCost, optimizerCanAffordCompletion, and optimizerStateIsValidFullSquad.
optimizer_flow.position_constraints: squadRequirements, tactics, countsByPosition, optimizerRemainingNeeds, optimizerSlotOrder, positionsMatchRequirements.
optimizer_flow.fixture_diversification: portfolioOptimizerAdjustment and strategy scoring profiles inside optimizerStateRank.
optimizer_flow.optionality_adjustment: Final Round artifact/objective summary contains optionality; live optimizer scoring remains in script.js strategy profile and portfolio logic.
optimizer_flow.third_place_risk_adjustment: playerMatchesBuilderRiskControls, strategy scoring profile, role/risk fields, and portfolio analytics remain in script.js.
optimizer_flow.role_trust_adjustment: activeTrustMode, trustFilteredPlayers, trustAdjustedScore, qaReviewCount, and risk controls remain in script.js.
optimizer_flow.captain_vice_selection: optimizerStateRank uses captainRecommendationScore for rank bonus; display/user captain and vice behavior remain in script.js.
optimizer_flow.objective_scoring: teamBuilderStrategyPlayerScore, optimizerStateRank, portfolioOptimizerAdjustment, and strategy profiles remain in script.js.
optimizer_flow.tie_breaking: sortPlayersForBuilderStrategy, optimizerCandidatePools sorted lists, uniqueOptimizerCandidates, pruneOptimizerStates, and optimizerStateRank remain in script.js.
optimizer_flow.final_squad_rendering: generatedFinalRoundBalancedSquad uses the artifact by default; renderTeam, renderRuleChecks, renderPortfolioAnalytics, and renderSquadStrategyReport remain in script.js.

duplicated_logic: selected squad budget/count summaries now also available through shared helper utilities for validators
browser wrapper mirrors Node helper utilities

direct_answers.where_is_optimizer_loop: script.js buildSuggestedSquad around lines 12944-13035, with supporting state/pool/rank helpers around lines 12470-12932.
pure_and_deterministic_functions: new selected-squad utility helpers in scripts/lib/teamBuilderPublicModel.mjs and teamBuilderPublicHelpers.js
direct_answers.mutates_candidates_or_artifacts: The new helpers do not mutate inputs. Existing optimizer state helpers create new state objects; UI render functions mutate DOM and app state.
direct_answers.budget_positions_team_constraints: Budget, positions, and country limits are enforced in optimizerStateIsValidFullSquad, optimizerCanAffordCompletion, optimizerRemainingNeeds, optimizerSlotOrder, canAddCountry, and countryLimitViolations.
direct_answers.locks: getValidLockedSquadPlayers filters lockedPlayerIds and preserves valid locked players before the path search.
direct_answers.captain_vice: optimizerStateRank uses captainRecommendationScore for ranking bonus; captain/vice validation is now available as read-only helper output but not wired into selection.
direct_answers.smallest_safe_extraction: Read-only selected-squad constraint utility helpers for audit and validation only.
